sentences.english: My biggest regret is not studying abroad when I had the chance in college.
sentences.korean: 가장 큰 후회는 대학 때 기회가 있었는데 유학을 안 간 거예요.

sentences.english: I regret not learning to play an instrument when I was young.
sentences.korean: 어렸을 때 악기를 배우지 않은 게 후회돼요.

sentences.english: It's much harder to start as an adult.
I try not to have regrets, because every experience teaches you something.

sentences.korean: 모든 경험이 뭔가를 가르쳐주니까요. 실수도 성장에 도움이 돼요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
